resizeDescription: Your window is {{width}}×{{height}} — we recommend {{recommendedWidth}}×{{recommendedHeight}} for a cleaner recording.
tabsDescription: Too many open tabs can slow capture. You can also ignore this warning and record as-is.
spaceSwitchFailed: Could not switch space. Reconnect the extension.
connectDescription: Authorize from the DocFlow website without entering a service URL or pairing code.
connectionSaved: The connection is stored securely in this browser.
videoComingSoon: Video recording is coming soon. Use Interactive Demo for now.
screenshotComingSoon: The standalone screenshot tool is coming soon. For a screenshot-based demo, choose Screenshot after opening Interactive Demo.
automaticDemo: A demo will be created when recording starts
serviceUnavailable: DocFlow is temporarily unavailable. Your connection has been kept.
settingsDescription: Manage the account connection and recording guide
defaultAIHint: Generate titles and guide copy in the background
showGuideAgain: Show the recording guide next time
guideReset: Reset complete. The guide will appear before your next recording.
connectionExpired: Connection expired. Authorize the extension again.
invalidCode: The pairing code is invalid or expired.
createDemoFirst: Create a demo in DocFlow first.
setupOpened: Finish recording setup on the current page.
setupHint: A demo is created when you start. New tabs and windows also join this recording.
setupDescription: Choose HTML or Screenshot, then confirm the destination and AI enhancement.
setupInteractiveTitle: Ready to record an interactive demo
setupInteractiveDescription: Interactive mode is selected. Confirm AI, then start recording.
setupScreenshotTitle: Ready to record a screenshot demo
setupScreenshotDescription: Screenshot mode is selected. Confirm AI, then start recording.
htmlDescription: Clone full HTML and CSS for pixel-perfect, editable interactive steps.
screenshotDescription: Build a multi-step demo from static page captures, ideal for Canvas, video, or complex pages.
aiDescription: Generate titles, descriptions, and hotspot tips in the background without blocking capture.
aiUnavailable: AI is not configured on the server
quotaUsage: Currently used: {{used}} / {{limit}}. Access resumes automatically after the quota is increased.
quotaResourcesExceeded: The resource limit has been reached.
quotaStepsExceeded: This demo has reached its step limit.
quotaMembersExceeded: The member limit has been reached.
quotaSharesExceeded: The active-share limit has been reached.
quotaAIExceeded: The monthly AI token quota is exhausted.
quotaExportsExceeded: The monthly export quota is exhausted.
quotaVideoExceeded: The monthly video allowance is exhausted.
quotaViewsExceeded: The monthly public-view allowance is exhausted.
quotaDownloadsExceeded: The monthly download allowance is exhausted.
hoverDescription: Elements highlight as you hover. Click to capture the step and anchor your hotspot.
pauseDescription: HTML capture clones each page’s full HTML and CSS. A brief pause ensures every step processes cleanly.
screenshotPauseTitle: Confirm the page before each capture
screenshotPauseDescription: Screenshot demos save the visible page. Wait for the page to settle before capture for clear, consistent steps.
stopDescription: You’ll get a pixel-perfect, fully interactive clone. Every element is editable, no re-recording needed.
screenshotStopDescription: Every screenshot step remains editable, with hotspots and guide copy you can refine without re-recording.
selectElement: Hover and click an element to capture
manualTooltip: Manually capture this screen without hotspots
manualBody: Review this screen, then continue to the next step.
stopTooltip: Stop recording and open the editor
